recommended.title: Caseoh | Jynxzi Podcast #1
recommended.reason: Features two high-energy, viral personalities known for loud reactions and comedy, ideal for short-form clips.

recommended.title: Dan Houser: GTA, Red Dead Redemption, Rockstar, Absurd & Future of Gaming | Lex Fridman Podcast #484
recommended.reason: High-authority guest (Rockstar co-founder) providing dense industry insights and insider stories on massive franchises.

recommended.title: The TOP 10 Games of ALL TIME | State of the Arc Podcast
recommended.reason: Ranking format is highly clippable; each rank provides a natural payoff and point of debate.

recommended.title: An entire generation just stopped buying games
recommended.reason: Strong controversial hook and industry critique likely to generate high engagement and debate in shorts.

recommended.title: Nintendo Raises prices, Valve realized its 2026, XBOX DID NOTHING The BEST gaming podcast 588
recommended.reason: Contains multiple controversial topics and strong opinions on major gaming brands.
